docs.title: Building Pharmaceutical Decision Systems
docs.text: A hands-on book that teaches decision science through a complete fictional pharmaceutical launch.

docs.title: Overview
docs.text: This project explores how pharmaceutical decision science connects evidence to action across a complex, multi-stakeholder market. Through the fictional launch of Roventra, you will learn essential methods for market sizing, patient journeys, competitive intelligence, targeting, measurement, and resource allocation.

docs.title: Chapters
docs.text:
• Chapter 1: A Medicine, a Market, and the Decisions Between Them - Introduction to the Roventra market, key entities, and scope
  • Chapter 2: The Commercialization Operating System - Patient path, launch organization, and operational structure
  • Appendix 2A: Role Definitions

docs.title: What You'll Learn
docs.text:
• Foundational analytics: Market sizing, patient journeys, competitive dynamics, targeting, omnichannel measurement, and resource allocation
  • Cutting-edge methods: Real-world evidence, causal inference, machine learning for treatment-effect estimation, and language models for decision support
  • Hands-on implementation: Working code examples and practical decision science applications

Visit the repository: Building Pharma Decision Systems
